mapper.select: select seq_user.nextval as userNum from dual
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS(USER_NUM, USER_PWD, USER_EMAIL, USER_NAME, USER_PHONE) VALUES(#{userNum}, #{userPwd}, #{userEmail}, #{userName}, #{userPhone})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USERS ORDER BY USER_REGDATE DESC
SELECT USER_NUM, USER_NAME, USER_EMAIL FROM USERS WHERE USER_ROLE = '관리자' ORDER BY USER_NAME ASC
